title: NightHaven
description:
This pack will not get more updates
Necessary mods to join SMP
body:
### **Modpack is archived and will not get more updates because I'm not anymore part of this project.**


Mods that are required for playing on NightHaven SMP 

Add some building mods for a lot of new blocks and features, plus 8000 new blocks. Also included are some mods for vanilla+ features, such as Carpet for technical players useful in redstone buildings and Charm for some new items and features like encantements and items. Have some optimization mods Like Sodium and Indium to improve fps. Visual mods like Elytra Trims and its add-on for visual cosmetics
